_note: Mock example only. Not generated from production data. Field names are illustrative and do not reflect the actual private schema.
_purpose: Show how reported state carries freshness. Every value has an observed-at time and a label; stale data is presented as last-known, never as live. See docs/trust-quartet.md (Freshness is part of truth).
_phrasing_note: Generated wording uses 'as of <time>' rather than 'currently' or 'right now', because there is no single live fetch behind a composite system answer.

values.reason: No live fetch; system is in Sovereign posture, so no outbound call was made.

_summary: Two values are fresh and stated as such; one is stale and explicitly marked last-known rather than current; one is simply unavailable. The system labels what it knows and the age of that knowledge, and does not fabricate a live answer it cannot back.
